core.name: Nova Theme
core.description: Shared colour, layout, RGB, and Nova Player visual-language engine.

core.name: Nova Audio Theme
core.description: Reusable bass-reactive audio analyser extracted from Nova Player.

core.name: Nova Session
core.description: Persistent investigation session engine used by Nova core and modules.

core.name: Nova Memory
core.description: Local per-website knowledge store for notes, selectors, endpoints, modules, and findings.

core.name: Nova Trace
core.description: Developer investigation tool for recording safe page activity metadata.

core.name: Nova API Body Catcher
core.description: Safe API response-body metadata catcher for investigations.

core.name: Nova DOM Inspector
core.description: Universal page structure inspector for safe DOM metadata snapshots.

core.name: Nova Investigation Export
core.description: AI-ready export package combining session, trace, DOM, and Nova metadata.

core.name: Nova Menu
core.description: Single movable Nova orb with Modules and Advanced views.

core.name: Nova Orb Extras
core.description: Extra Nova orb controls and repair helpers.

core.name: Nova Memory Panel
core.description: Advanced memory panel opened from Nova Advanced.

core.name: Nova Memory AutoLearn
core.description: Automatic safe learning from DOM and Trace summaries into local website memory.

core.name: Nova Brain
core.description: Local pattern engine that turns DOM, Trace, and Memory summaries into grounded insights and module recommendations.

core.name: Nova Window Manager
core.description: Shared Nova window discovery and management engine.

core.name: Nova Module Loader
core.description: Downloads, caches, updates, and launches Nova modules from this manifest.

modules.name: Nova Watch
modules.description: Core-dependent live clock with Nova themes, audio-reactive glow, saved layout, settings, and gremlin messages.

modules.name: Nova Suno Player
modules.description: Floating Suno music controller module for play, pause, next, previous, shuffle, and lyrics experiments.
